finding: Temp directory naming unspecified — format, length, collision handling, randomness source undefined. PID-based naming will collide with concurrent processes.
suggestion: Specify crypto/rand UUID or 16-byte hex string for temp dir naming, with fallback error after N creation attempts.

finding: Shard directory creation not specified. Rename will fail if files/{first2chars}/ doesn't exist. No handling for ENOSPC/EACCES on rename.
suggestion: Add step: create shard directory with MkdirAll before rename. Specify non-EEXIST rename errors are fatal (exit 4).

finding: Atomic swap fails if vendor.allegro.old/ exists from a previous crash. First rename hits EEXIST.
suggestion: Before atomic swap, check for and delete any existing vendor.allegro.old/ directory.

finding: Bin proxy scripts generated into vendor.allegro.tmp/bin/ but spec doesn't clarify that embedded paths must use runtime paths (__DIR__), not build-time temp paths.
suggestion: Explicitly state that all paths in proxy scripts use __DIR__ which resolves at PHP runtime to the final vendor/bin/ path.

finding: BinProxyWrapper for PHP targets with shebang is entirely unspecified — no implementation, no interface contract, no Composer version reference. ~80-line class cannot be implemented without reading Composer source.
suggestion: Inline the full BinProxyWrapper class template, or provide exact Composer source file and version reference.

finding: installed.php root entry fallback values undefined when composer.json fields are absent. pretty_version hardcoded as dev-main in example — wrong for projects with version field or different branch.
suggestion: Specify exact fallbacks: no name → __root__, no version → dev-main, no type → project. Clarify version derivation rules.

finding: Top-level directory stripping logic undefined for archives with both root files and a directory, or multiple top-level entries. Empty archive handling missing.
suggestion: Define: strip only when ALL entries share a common single root directory prefix. Empty archive = extraction error (exit 1).

finding: Link strategy probe assumes store directory exists. On first run, probe fails before step 1. Store creation timing relative to probe unspecified.
suggestion: Add prerequisite: ensure store directory exists before probe. Probe cleanup failures are non-fatal (log warning).

finding: dumpautoload runs after atomic swap on live vendor/. If it fails/interrupts, vendor is linked-but-broken with no autoloader. No cleanup/recovery specified.
suggestion: Specify recovery: leave vendor as-is and require re-run, or document partial state as known limitation.

finding: composer.json required even when --no-autoload flag is set. With --no-autoload, composer.json is unnecessary.
suggestion: When --no-autoload is set, skip composer.json presence check.

finding: dist.shasum hash algorithm unspecified. Composer uses SHA-1 for dist.shasum, not SHA-256. Implementer using SHA-256 will always fail verification.
suggestion: State explicitly: dist.shasum is SHA-1 hex digest. Distinguish from CAS internal SHA-256.

finding: installed.php uses __DIR__ which resolves to vendor.allegro.tmp/composer/ at write time but to vendor/composer/ after atomic swap. Correctness depends on rename semantics not stated.
suggestion: Clarify that __DIR__ is a PHP runtime construct resolved at include-time, not at file-write-time, so atomic rename is safe.

finding: Archive extraction failure and concurrent install timeout both map to exit 1, but 7.3 defines exit 1 as 'General error'. Exit code taxonomy inconsistently applied.
suggestion: Audit all 11.1 error conditions and map each to a 7.3 exit code. Add missing categories to 7.3 or reclassify.

finding: Disk full handling unspecified for different pipeline stages. Disk full during CAS extraction, vendor build, and atomic rename have different cleanup implications.
suggestion: Specify per-stage cleanup: CAS temp → cleanup temp dir; vendor build → cleanup vendor.allegro.tmp/; atomic rename → state unknown, re-run required.

finding: PHP detection regex uses {…} delimiters — not valid in Go regexp (RE2). Go implementation will fail to compile this regex.
suggestion: Rewrite regex in Go RE2 syntax. Specify 500-byte fallback: if <?php not found, treat as non-PHP.

finding: Hardlinks within tar archives not addressed. Tar supports hardlinks — should these be stored as separate CAS entries?
suggestion: Add: hardlinks in tar archives are extracted as independent file copies, stored as separate CAS entries by content hash.

finding: CAS files stored as 0444 (read-only) may cause issues with store prune needing to delete them on some systems.
suggestion: Specify that store prune uses os.Remove (which requires write permission on parent dir, not file itself on Linux) — clarify this is OS-correct.

finding: Prune algorithm unspecified — no enumeration strategy, no orphan detection logic, no concurrent-install race handling.
suggestion: Specify algorithm: enumerate manifests → collect hashes → enumerate CAS files → delete unreferenced. Warn about concurrent install.

finding: Package naming convention assumed but not specified for flat packages (without vendor/ prefix in name).
suggestion: Clarify: split package name on / for path. Flat packages without / use vendor/{name} directly.

finding: installed.json field mapping not exhaustive. Fields like require, bin, source, dist may be needed by dumpautoload but are not listed.
suggestion: Audit Composer source for which installed.json fields dumpautoload reads. Add bin to mapping table at minimum.

finding: aliases field in installed.php always empty in example but Composer supports branch aliases. Source mapping undefined.
suggestion: Specify: map aliases from package extra.branch-alias if present, otherwise empty array.

finding: Link strategy probe creates temp dir in project root, overlapping with vendor.allegro.tmp/ creation. Naming collision possible.
suggestion: Clarify probe temp dir name vs build temp dir name. Confirm probe cleanup happens before vendor build.

finding: HTTP 429 retry-after interaction with 3-retry budget unclear. Single 429 could exhaust budget before real download attempt.
suggestion: Clarify: 429 retries count within the 3-retry budget.

finding: Lock file creation failure (read-only dir, disk full) not handled. Lock file persistence after release not specified.
suggestion: Specify: lock file created with O_CREAT, not deleted after release. Creation failure → exit 4.

finding: store_version check: exit code, error message, and timing (before/after CLI flag parsing) not specified.
suggestion: Specify exit code 1, message format, and that check occurs after store path resolution but before any store operations.

finding: Windows binary in MVP builds but vendor/bin/ proxies are Unix-only. Windows users get silently broken bin directory.
suggestion: Add to Section 17: Windows vendor/bin/ proxy scripts not generated in MVP.

finding: findShortestPathCode path format not algorithmically specified. Deep nesting path computation unclear.
suggestion: Specify algorithm or state: always __DIR__ . '/../{vendor}/{package}/{bin-entry}'.

finding: Disk savings metric misleading for first install — shows total size as 'saved' when no deduplication occurred.
suggestion: Clarify metric is theoretical maximum. Consider showing 'X files shared with other projects' instead.

finding: Test asserts same inode for reflink, but reflinks do NOT share inodes on any filesystem. Only hardlinks share inodes.
suggestion: Fix: hardlink → verify same inode; reflink → verify different inode but reduced disk usage via du comparison.

finding: Section 17.2 duplicates the dumpautoload/vendor/bin explanation already in Section 6.5.
suggestion: Replace 17.2 duplicate with cross-reference to Section 6.5.
